name: View: 2009 CWE/SANS Top 25 Most Dangerous Programming Errors
description: This is a View (not a weakness) that organizes the 2009 CWE/SANS Top 25 Most Dangerous Programming Errors into three categories: Insecure Interaction Between Components, Risky Resource Management, and Porous Defenses. Views are navigational frameworks and cannot be mapped to real-world vulnerabilities.
